# Aloomii — AI-Powered Customer Success

> Aloomii is an AI-powered customer success and sales intelligence system built for B2B founders at $0–5M ARR who need pipeline and relationship infrastructure without a full-time sales team.

## What Aloomii Does

Aloomii replaces the SDR function and upgrades the AE function for relationship-intensive B2B businesses. It monitors markets for buying signals, keeps every client relationship warm, maps warm introduction paths, and delivers daily intelligence briefs — 24/7, autonomously.

**Core capabilities:**
- Signal Scout: monitors Reddit, X, Hacker News, LinkedIn, and Product Hunt for B2B buying intent signals, scored 1–5
- Relationship Monitor: tracks all contacts, surfaces follow-up opportunities at the right moment
- Reconnection Engine: prevents warm leads and clients from going cold
- Network Enrichment: maps warm introduction paths through existing relationships
- Event Scanner: identifies founder meetups, accelerator deadlines, and ICP-relevant events
- Senior PM: delivers daily strategy briefs and weekly pipeline reviews
- Content Engine: drafts and distributes brand content at scale

## Who It's For

**Ideal Customer Profile:**
- B2B founders at $0–5M ARR
- No dedicated sales team or SDR
- Relationship-intensive industries (fintech, professional services, SaaS, consulting)
- Founders doing their own outreach and losing deals in the follow-up

## Pricing

- Done-With-You: $2,000–3,500/mo + 5–10% performance layer
- Human equivalent: replaces $60,000–90,000/yr SDR + $90,000–110,000/yr AE = $145,000/yr in salaries

## Key Differentiators

- Not a tool — a fully autonomous AI workforce (15 agents)
- Relationship-first, not just lead volume
- Warm intro mapping via existing network
- Daily intelligence, not just alerts
- Proprietary Aloomii Score (1–5) for signal qualification

## Contact

- Website: https://aloomii.com
- Dashboard: https://aloomii.com/aloomii-os.html

## Blog

Aloomii publishes deep-dive articles for B2B founders on three content pillars:

1. **AI Sales System** — How to deploy AI agents to replace SDR workflows, automate prospecting, and manage pipeline intelligence autonomously.
2. **Industry Playbooks** — Sector-specific guides for fintech, professional services, SaaS, and consulting founders on regulatory exposure, relationship infrastructure, and CRM compliance.
3. **Comparisons** — Honest breakdowns of AI sales tools, CRMs, and automation stacks — what they cost, what they hide, and when to use them.

**Blog index:** https://aloomii.com/blog
**Author:** Yohann Calpu — Co-founder, Aloomii. Background: JP Morgan Chase, IBM, 8 years Ontario Government.
**Content schema:** BlogPosting + FAQPage + BreadcrumbList JSON-LD per article

### Published Articles

- **Your CRM Is a Regulatory Liability: What FSRA and SEC Auditors Actually Look For**
  URL: https://aloomii.com/blog/crm-regulatory-liability
  Pillar: Industry Playbooks
  Summary: Most financial services firms unknowingly create audit exposure through their CRM. This article explains what FSRA and SEC examiners look for, and how self-hosted AI infrastructure eliminates the risk.

- **The Real Cost of an SDR in 2026: A Founder's Honest Breakdown**
  URL: https://aloomii.com/blog/the-real-cost-of-an-sdr-in-2026
  Pillar: AI Sales System
  Summary: A data-driven breakdown of the true fully-loaded cost of an SDR ($145,000+/yr) versus deploying an AI sales system at $4,500+/month. Includes the compounding asset argument for AI-first pipeline.
